description_long: This is a single bed with a minimalist, modern platform frame constructed from light-colored wood. The bed features a high headboard and a partial sideboard, both made from the same wood material, providing a sense of enclosure on two sides. The mattress is clearly visible and appears to be a standard, light gray or white, with a subtle striped texture. The foot and one side of the bed are open, making it easy to access from two directions. The wood grain is visible throughout the frame, giving it a natural and contemporary look. There are no visible drawers, handles, or additional storage features integrated into the frame.
description: A modern, light wood platform bed with a high headboard, partial sideboard, and a visible light-colored mattress.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high headboard, partial sideboard, and the full length of the mattress.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open foot and side, with the mattress and both wooden boards visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid headboard and the thickness of the wooden frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full height of the headboard and sideboard, with the open side and foot not visible.
